---
# Code Generation Master Instruction — CO-STAR BFSI Framework
# version: 2.0.0 | updated: 2024-01-15 | framework: CO-STAR+PromptML
---

# Code Generation Master Instruction

> This is the authoritative master instruction file ingested by all CO-STAR
> prompt files before generating code. It defines the universal rules,
> architecture patterns, technology constraints, and compliance baseline
> that apply across **all** BFSI domains.

---

## 1. Universal Technology Baseline

The following technology constraints are non-negotiable and apply to every
file generated by any prompt in this framework.

### 1.1 Language and Runtime

```
Scala    : 2.13.14   — immutable, functional, val-only
Java     : 17 LTS    — minimum JDK version
sbt      : 1.9.x     — build tool with pinned versions
```

### 1.2 Data Processing

```
Apache Spark  : 3.5.1   — Structured Streaming + Batch
Delta Lake    : 3.1.0   — ACID ledger, time travel, schema enforcement
Kafka         : 3.6.x   — Event streaming (optional, domain-specific)
```

### 1.3 Libraries

```
Cats           : 2.10.0   — Functional programming abstractions
Cats-Effect    : 3.5.4    — IO monad, async effects
Circe          : 0.14.7   — JSON encoding/decoding (schema-validated)
ScalaTest      : 3.2.18   — Unit + integration testing
ScalaCheck     : 1.17.1   — Property-based tests for financial math
Mockito-Scala  : 5.3.1    — Typed mocking
Typesafe Config: 1.4.3    — All configuration via HOCON
Prometheus     : 0.16.0   — Metrics (RED + USE methodology)
OpenTelemetry  : 1.32.0   — Distributed tracing
```

---

## 2. DDD + Hexagonal Architecture — Universal Rules

### 2.1 Layer Definitions

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Layer 1: DOMAIN                                                │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌───────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │   model/   │  │   services/   │  │   specifications/    │  │
│  │ Aggregates │  │  Pure domain  │  │  Specification[T]    │  │
│  │ Value Obs  │  │  functions    │  │  Business rules      │  │
│  │ Domain Err │  │  No side FX   │  │  Predicate-based     │  │
│  └────────────┘  └───────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘  │
│                                                                 │
│  RULE: NO Spark, NO DB, NO HTTP in this layer. Pure Scala.     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Layer 2: APPLICATION                                           │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌───────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │ commands/  │  │   queries/    │  │       jobs/          │  │
│  │ Write-side │  │  Read-side    │  │  Spark batch jobs    │  │
│  │ CQRS cmds  │  │  CQRS queries │  │  Use domain layer    │  │
│  └────────────┘  └───────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘  │
│                                                                 │
│  RULE: Orchestrates domain + infra. No business logic here.    │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Layer 3: INFRASTRUCTURE                                        │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌───────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │   spark/   │  │  persistence/ │  │       config/        │  │
│  │ SparkFact. │  │  Repo impls   │  │  AppConfig HOCON     │  │
│  │ Readers    │  │  Delta Lake   │  │  ${?ENV_VAR} subst.  │  │
│  │ Writers    │  │  JDBC adapters│  │                      │  │
│  └────────────┘  └───────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Layer 4: SECURITY                                              │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌───────────────┐  ┌──────────────────────┐  │
│  │ encryption/│  │   masking/    │  │       audit/         │  │
│  │ AES-256-GCM│  │  PiiMasker    │  │  AuditLogger         │  │
│  │ Key mgmt   │  │  IBAN/PAN     │  │  Immutable events    │  │
│  └────────────┘  └───────────────┘  └──────────────────────┘  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Layer 5: OBSERVABILITY                                         │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌───────────────┐                            │
│  │  metrics/  │  │   tracing/    │                            │
│  │ Prometheus │  │  OTel spans   │                            │
│  │ RED + USE  │  │ correlationId │                            │
│  └────────────┘  └───────────────┘                            │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### 2.2 Layer Dependency Rules (enforced by code-reviewer)

| Source Layer   | May Import             | May NOT Import          |
|----------------|------------------------|-------------------------|
| domain         | Scala stdlib, Cats     | Spark, JDBC, HTTP, Kafka|
| application    | domain, infrastructure | External frameworks directly |
| infrastructure | domain, Spark, Delta   | Application layer        |
| security       | domain                 | application, infra adapters |
| observability  | Scala stdlib           | domain business logic    |

---

## 3. Financial Code — Universal Rules

### 3.1 Money Representation

```scala
// ALWAYS: BigDecimal + MathContext.DECIMAL128
val amount: BigDecimal = BigDecimal("1000.00")(MathContext.DECIMAL128)

// NEVER: Double, Float, Int for money
// val amount: Double = 1000.00  ← FORBIDDEN
```

### 3.2 Rounding

```scala
// ALWAYS: HALF_EVEN (Banker's rounding) for all financial division/rounding
amount.setScale(2, BigDecimal.RoundingMode.HALF_EVEN)
```

### 3.3 Monetary Direction

```scala
// ALWAYS: sealed trait direction — never negative BigDecimal
sealed trait Direction
case object Debit  extends Direction
case object Credit extends Direction

// NEVER: amount = BigDecimal("-100.00")  ← FORBIDDEN
```

### 3.4 Currency

```scala
// ALWAYS: sealed trait enumeration with ISO 4217 codes
sealed trait Currency { def isoCode: String }
case object EUR extends Currency { val isoCode = "EUR" }
case object GBP extends Currency { val isoCode = "GBP" }
case object USD extends Currency { val isoCode = "USD" }
// ... all supported currencies listed explicitly
```

---

## 4. Error Handling — Universal Rules

```scala
// DOMAIN ERRORS: sealed trait hierarchy
sealed trait DomainError
final case class ValidationError(msg: String)        extends DomainError
final case class InsufficientFundsError(msg: String) extends DomainError
final case class ComplianceViolation(rule: String)   extends DomainError
final case class SanctionsViolation(entity: String)  extends DomainError

// ALL domain methods return Either — NEVER throw
def process(cmd: Command): Either[DomainError, Result]

// ALL optional fields use Option — NEVER null
val reference: Option[String] = None
```

---

## 5. Spark Universal Rules

```scala
// ALWAYS: Dataset[T] with explicit Encoders
import org.apache.spark.sql.Encoders
val ds: Dataset[PaymentRecord] = spark.read
  .format("delta")
  .load(path)
  .as[PaymentRecord](Encoders.product)

// NEVER: raw DataFrame in domain or application layer
// val df: DataFrame = ...  ← FORBIDDEN in domain/app layer

// AQE always enabled in SparkSessionProvider
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.adaptive.enabled", "true")
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.adaptive.coalescePartitions.enabled", "true")

// LIMIT .collect() — only for small aggregated results
val summary = resultDS.agg(...).collect() // only after .agg — not full dataset
```

---

## 6. Security Universal Rules

```scala
// PII masking before any log output
logger.info(s"Processing iban=${PiiMasker.maskIban(iban)}")

// AES-256-GCM for all sensitive data at rest
val encrypted = AesGcmCipher.encrypt(sensitiveData, keyFromVault)

// application.conf — environment variable substitution ONLY
# application.conf
db.password = ${?DB_PASSWORD}     # NEVER hardcode
kafka.apiKey = ${?KAFKA_API_KEY}  # NEVER hardcode

// TLS 1.3 minimum for all external connections
```

---

## 7. GENERATION_REPORT.md Template

Every code generation session must conclude with creating this file:

```markdown
# GENERATION REPORT
Generated : <UTC timestamp>
Domain    : <domain>
Prompt    : code-generator.prompt.md v2.0.0
Instructions ingested:
  - .github/instructions/<domain>/domain-overview.md
  - .github/instructions/<domain>/business-rules.md
  - ... (list all files)

Files created:
| # | File path | SHA-256 (first 8) |
|---|-----------|-------------------|
| 1 | build.sbt | <hash> |
| ... |

Assumptions [list any [ASSUMPTION] tags encountered]:
  - [ASSUMPTION-1]: ...

Regulatory baseline applied:
  - PCI-DSS v4.0 Req 3, 4, 6
  - GDPR Art 25, Art 32
  - PSD2 Art 97
  - AML 6AMLD

Review status: PENDING (run /code-reviewer)
```
